title: Association between hemoglobin, albumin, lymphocyte, and platelet (HALP) score and overall survival in patients with cancer cachexia: A multicenter cohort study.
snippet: Nutritional status and inflammatory processes serve as significant factors that contribute to the development and progression of cancer cachexia. The hemoglobin, albumin, lymphocyte, and platelet (HALP) score is an emerging marker for assessing nutritional and inflammatory status, however, its association with overall survival (OS) in patients with cancer c...
